description: The live work item (replaces the job sheet's Jobs tab). One row per claim/instruction tracked through intake -> parse/classify -> human review -> enrich -> EVA export + Box archive. Carries the 12 EVA payload fields (pre-fill, staff-reviewed; never auto-final), the dedup keys, and overview-only facts. Matching = by VRM into the single OPEN case (ADR-0002); dedup tiebreaker = claim reference, not time (ADR-0010).

lifecycle.note: One of the four M1-live tables (Case, Evidence, WorkProvider, AuditEvent). Write-heavy.

primaryColumn.description: Human-friendly label for the row (e.g. VRM + provider). Not the Case/PO; casePo is separate and set at parse-confirm (see cr1bd_casepo).

columns.description: Vehicle registration mark. Primary correlation key (ADR-0002). Case-identity field, NOT an EVA payload field.
Source / claim / provider reference. The dedup tiebreaker (ADR-0010): same-vs-new is disambiguated by reference, not time. Case-identity field, NOT an EVA payload field.

principalCode + 2-digit year + 3-digit provider sequence. SET AT PARSE-CONFIRM (live intake Scope_generate_casepo -> Update_case_casepo), absent until then. Stored canonical; rendered lowercase for EVA, UPPERCASE for Box. The Box folder name (UPPERCASE) exists once this is set. Case-identity field, NOT an EVA payload field.
DEDUP KEY. Graph / Internet Message-ID of the originating email. Exact repeat -> drop (ADR-0010). Backs the get-or-create idempotency guard (alternate key).
DEDUP KEY. SHA256 over normalized subject + from + sorted attachment SHA256s. Exact repeat -> drop (ADR-0010).

FINALIZE IDEMPOTENCY LATCH. SHA256 of the last EVA+Box payload that finalize-eva-box successfully submitted. The Guard_already_finalized check re-runs only when this != the new requested payload hash (cr1bd_submitpayloadhash), so a re-run never double-submits or re-creates the Box folder. Written LAST by finalize-eva-box alongside cr1bd_status=box_synced. Declared here to close pre-existing drift (the live flow read/wrote it before case.json declared it).

FINALIZE SUBMIT-SIGNAL (Phase 7, ADR-0012 / 00-BUILD-PLAN reconciliation 'Code App -> flow invocation'). The Code App NEVER POSTs to a flow SAS URL under CSP connect-src 'none'; instead makeDataverseFinalizeTransport PATCHes this flag = true (with cr1bd_submitpayloadhash + cr1bd_evapayload12) to REQUEST finalize. The Dataverse-triggered finalize-eva-box watches this column (When-a-row-is-modified, filteringattributes=cr1bd_submitrequested, filterexpression cr1bd_submitrequested eq true) and resets it to false LAST after a successful submit, so the flag is the trigger boundary and a fresh app request is required to re-run. Written by the Code App; reset by finalize-eva-box; NEVER read back to drive dedup/status/sequencing.

FINALIZE SUBMIT-SIGNAL (Phase 7). The byte-identical SHA256 the Code App requests finalize for (built by the SAME eva-export serializer the flow validates). The flow reads this as its payloadHash, compares it to the cr1bd_finalizedpayloadhash latch in Guard_already_finalized, and stamps the latch = this value LAST on success. Kept DISTINCT from the latch so writing the request does not pre-empt the 'stamped-LAST' resume-safety (a partial failure leaves the latch unstamped and a re-request resumes cleanly). Written by the Code App with cr1bd_submitrequested.

FINALIZE SUBMIT-SIGNAL (Phase 7). The staged, schema-valid 12-field EVA JSON (contract order) the Code App built with eva-export.ts and PATCHes alongside cr1bd_submitrequested. finalize-eva-box reads it back VERBATIM for the EVA Sentry submit (body/evaPayload12) and the JSON drag-drop .eva.json body, preserving byte-identicality (the flow never re-serializes the 12 cr1bd_eva* columns, which would risk format drift). Carries the payload to the Dataverse-triggered flow because a row-update trigger exposes only the row, not an HTTP body.
DEDUP STAGING. none|pending|linked. Drives duplicate_risk and the attach-vs-new review (ADR-0010).
DEDUP STAGING. JSON list of candidate open-case IDs / collision context surfaced to the attach-vs-new decision UI. Never auto-merges.
Workflow state machine. The 11-value global choice set (cr1bd_casestatus) is the parity keystone vs the prototype CaseStatus union + data-model.md.

Work TYPE (ORTHOGONAL to status): standard|audit. audit = a second, independent CE inspection auditing a THIRD-PARTY engineer's original report (ADR-0014); set from the parser's `audit` signal, numbered with an `A.` Case/PO prefix, carrying an `engineer_report` Evidence. Default standard (null treated as standard). NOT the engineer-report overlay.
email|whatsapp. Audatex out of scope.
Channel mode: true = manual, false = auto. (Email x Auto/Manual, WhatsApp always manual per ADR-0007.)
Shared inbox / WhatsApp group the item arrived on.
Why a PERSON must act (needs-action cases only; null otherwise). STORED not derived (Phase-1 Risk #9) for dashboard facet chips + aging tallies.
Aging / past-due chips.
Scheduled / actual inspection date.
When the case was exported/submitted to EVA. Windows the 'Done today' / throughput tallies.
Mirror of the chosen InspectionAddress.decisionMode; drives the readiness check. image_based always requires an explicit reason.
-> WorkProvider, matched by sender email domain (no alias matching). Drives principalCode / Case-PO generation.
-> ImageSource (nullable). The party/role supplying images/instructions.
-> InspectionAddress (nullable). The location on the case's EVA record.

BOX ONE-WAY MIRROR (Phase 7, ADR-0012). The Box folder id returned by CreateFolder (POST /2.0/folders); numeric string, 40 = headroom. Stamped when the UPPERCASE Case/PO folder is minted at parse-confirm (B1 box-folder-create). The Code App reads it to mint an 'Open in Box' deep link; box-file-request-copy reads it as the copy target (folder.id) and returns folder_not_ready when null. Written by Box flows; NEVER read back to drive dedup/status/sequencing.

BOX ONE-WAY MIRROR (Phase 7). The File-Request id returned by CopyFileRequest (POST /2.0/file_requests/{id}/copy); numeric string. Used for webhook correlation and expiry/lifecycle management (B2/B3). Written by box-file-request-copy.

BOX ONE-WAY MIRROR (Phase 7). The live uploader URL returned by CopyFileRequest, served to the 'copy chaser' UX for clipboard copy. format:Url selects the Single-Line-of-Text URL format (validated/rendered as a link; API type StringType); 400 is ample for a Box upload URL and well under the 4000 ceiling. Written by box-file-request-copy.

BOX ONE-WAY MIRROR (Phase 7, ADR-0012). The flow-contract sync timestamp. Stamped (=utcNow()) alongside cr1bd_boxfolderid when the Case/PO folder is minted (B1 box-folder-create Stamp_case_box_fields); finalize-eva-box restamps on archive. It is the AGE filter key for box-blob-purge: that scheduled sweep ListRecords cases where cr1bd_status=box_synced AND cr1bd_boxsyncedat < now-PurgeGraceDays, so Blob bytes are purged only once safely mirrored to Box + past the grace window. Declared here to close the same flow-contract drift as cr1bd_finalizedpayloadhash (the Box flows read/write it but case.json did not declare it). Written by Box flows; NEVER read back to drive dedup/status/sequencing.

BOX ONE-WAY MIRROR (Phase 7, ADR-0012). The folder shared-link URL (GetFolderSharedLink access=open) for the 'Open in Box' case-archive deep link. Stored so the Code App can surface it directly when the live connector is unbound (the free-account demo path); production mints it on demand via the connector. format:Url. Written Dataverse->Box only; NEVER read back to drive dedup/status/sequencing.
EVA field 1 (non-empty required for readiness). Pre-filled value mirrors WorkProvider; joined FieldLevelProvenance rows carry source/review. Staff-reviewed, never auto-final.
EVA field 2.
EVA field 3.
EVA field 4.
EVA field 5.
EVA field 6. String to preserve the exact DD/MM/YYYY EVA format ('' allowed). Pattern ^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}$|^$.
EVA field 7. DD/MM/YYYY or ''.
EVA field 8 (free text).
EVA field 9. The serialized 6-line address (newline-separated, padded to 6 lines) OR the literal 'Image Based Assessment'. Backed by the InspectionAddress record.
EVA field 10. Enum '' | 'Yes' | 'No' (kept as the exact EVA string token).
EVA field 11. Mileage value. Document/parser authoritative; DVSA fills only when the document has none (ADR-0006).
EVA field 12. Enum '' | 'Miles' | 'Km' (exact EVA string token).
OVERVIEW-ONLY. Imported when present; MUST NOT drive workflow / readiness / matching.
OVERVIEW-ONLY. MUST NOT drive workflow/readiness/matching. (Distinct from the EVA claimant name field.)
OVERVIEW-ONLY. MUST NOT drive workflow/readiness/matching.
OVERVIEW-ONLY. MUST NOT drive workflow/readiness/matching.
OVERVIEW-ONLY. MUST NOT drive workflow/readiness/matching.
OVERVIEW-ONLY (DD/MM/YYYY string). MUST NOT drive workflow/readiness/matching.
OVERVIEW-ONLY. MUST NOT drive workflow/readiness/matching.
OVERVIEW-ONLY. MUST NOT drive workflow/readiness/matching.
OVERVIEW-ONLY free-text repairer name. MUST NOT drive workflow/readiness/matching (the governed Repairer link is separate, via InspectionAddress).

alternateKeys.description: Idempotency guard for the intake get-or-create (prevents double-create on Graph retries). Exact Message-ID repeat -> drop (ADR-0010).

notes: EVA payload = the 12 cr1bd_eva* columns ONLY, in evaOrder 1..12. vrm / caseRef / casePo are Case-identity columns and NEVER part of the 12-field EVA JSON. (Engineer allocation is NOT an EVA submission field — assigned inside EVA after submission; removed from the contract, B3 RESOLVED.)
Per-field provenance + reviewState live in joined FieldLevelProvenance rows (separate table, chosen in Phase-1 §4), keyed by case + fieldName, NOT embedded on the Case row.
Overview-only (cr1bd_ov*) columns are imported for reference display only and are flagged mustNotDriveWorkflow=true.
Readiness (ready_for_eva) is deterministic: 12 EVA fields valid + image-rules + inspection-address decision + per-provider extras, OR explicit override.

Box one-way mirror (Phase 7, ADR-0012): cr1bd_boxfolderid / cr1bd_boxfilerequestid / cr1bd_boxfilerequesturl / cr1bd_boxsyncedat are written Dataverse->Box only. Dataverse stays the system of record; Box Metadata has no joins, so dedup / status / Case-PO sequencing NEVER run off these columns. (cr1bd_boxsyncedat is the box-blob-purge age filter key, stamped at folder-create — declared here to close the same flow-contract drift as cr1bd_finalizedpayloadhash.)

cr1bd_finalizedpayloadhash is the finalize-eva-box idempotency latch (declared here to close pre-existing drift; the live flow read/wrote it before case.json declared it). It is NOT a dedup key for intake (cr1bd_payloadhash / cr1bd_sourcemessageid serve that).

Finalize submit-signal (Phase 7, ADR-0012): the Code App requests finalize by PATCHing cr1bd_submitrequested=true + cr1bd_submitpayloadhash + cr1bd_evapayload12 (NOT a flow SAS POST — CSP connect-src 'none'). finalize-eva-box is a Dataverse-triggered flow (When a row is modified, filteringattributes=cr1bd_submitrequested, filterexpression cr1bd_submitrequested eq true): it reads caseId from the triggering row, reads the requested hash + staged payload from these columns, guards on cr1bd_finalizedpayloadhash, then stamps the latch + cr1bd_status=box_synced and RESETS cr1bd_submitrequested=false LAST. The request hash is kept distinct from the latch so writing the request never pre-empts the stamped-LAST resume-safety.
